<style>
    /* ============================================
       RESET & BASE
       ============================================ */
    *, *::before, *::after {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
    }

    body {
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: #2c2c2c;
      background: #faf7f2;
      line-height: 1.6;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    img {
      max-width: 100%;
      height: auto;
      display: block;
    }

    a {
      text-decoration: none;
      color: inherit;
      transition: color 0.3s ease;
    }

    ul {
      list-style: none;
    }

    /* ============================================
       CSS VARIABLES
       ============================================ */
    :root {
      --green-dark: #1a4d38;
      --green-header: #153d2d;
      --gold: #c9a96e;
      --gold-light: #e0c68a;
      --gold-hover: #d4b97a;
      --cream: #faf7f2;
      --white: #ffffff;
      --text-dark: #2c2c2c;
      --text-medium: #555555;
      --border-gold: rgba(201,169,110,0.3);
      --ff-heading: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      --ff-body: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    }

    /* ============================================
       TYPOGRAPHY
       ============================================ */
    h1, h2, h3, h4 {
      font-family: var(--ff-heading);
      font-weight: 600;
      line-height: 1.2;
    }

    .section-label {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .section-headline {
      font-family: var(--ff-heading);
      font-size: 2.8rem;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .gold-line {
      width: 60px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--gold);
      margin-bottom: 40px;
      transform: scaleX(0);
      transform-origin: left;
      transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
    }

    .gold-line.centered {
      margin-left: auto;
      margin-right: auto;
      transform-origin: center;
    }

    .gold-line.visible {
      transform: scaleX(1);
    }

    /* ============================================
       SCROLL REVEAL ANIMATIONS
       ============================================ */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(30px);
      transition: opacity 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94),
                  transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
    }

    .reveal.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    /* ============================================
       NAVBAR
       ============================================ */
    .navbar {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      z-index: 1000;
      background: var(--green-header);
      padding: 0 48px;
      height: 80px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      transition: transform 0.35s ease, background 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    }

    .navbar.hidden {
      transform: translateY(-100%);
    }

    .navbar.scrolled {
      background: rgba(21, 61, 45, 0.97);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    }

    .nav-logo {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .nav-logo-circle {
      width: 52px;
      height: 52px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      overflow: hidden;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .nav-logo-circle img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    .nav-logo-text {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .nav-logo-text .brand-name {
      font-family: var(--ff-heading);
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      color: var(--gold);
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    }

    .nav-logo-text .brand-tagline {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: rgba(201,169,110,0.65);
      letter-spacing: 1.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 400;
    }

    .nav-links {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 36px;
    }

    .nav-links a {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      font-weight: 400;
      color: rgba(250,247,242,0.85);
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: color 0.3s ease;
      position: relative;
    }

    .nav-links a::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -4px;
      left: 0;
      width: 0;
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--gold);
      transition: width 0.3s ease;
    }

    .nav-links a:hover {
      color: var(--gold);
    }

    .nav-links a:hover::after {
      width: 100%;
    }

    .nav-right {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 24px;
    }

    .nav-cta {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--gold) !important;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      border: 1px solid var(--gold);
      padding: 10px 24px;
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .nav-cta:hover {
      background: var(--gold);
      color: var(--green-dark) !important;
    }

    .nav-cta::after {
      display: none !important;
    }

    .lang-toggle {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }

    .lang-toggle button {
      background: none;
      border: none;
      color: rgba(250,247,242,0.5);
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      cursor: pointer;
      padding: 4px 6px;
      transition: color 0.3s ease;
    }

    .lang-toggle button.active {
      color: var(--gold);
    }

    .lang-toggle button:hover {
      color: var(--gold-light);
    }

    .lang-toggle .separator {
      color: rgba(250,247,242,0.3);
    }

    /* Hamburger */
    .hamburger {
      display: none;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 5px;
      cursor: pointer;
      padding: 8px;
      z-index: 1001;
    }

    .hamburger span {
      width: 24px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--gold);
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      display: block;
    }

    .hamburger.active span:nth-child(1) {
      transform: rotate(45deg) translate(5px, 5px);
    }

    .hamburger.active span:nth-child(2) {
      opacity: 0;
    }

    .hamburger.active span:nth-child(3) {
      transform: rotate(-45deg) translate(5px, -5px);
    }

    /* Mobile menu */
    .mobile-menu {
      display: none;
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      right: -100%;
      width: 300px;
      height: 100vh;
      background: var(--green-header);
      padding: 100px 40px 40px;
      transition: right 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
      z-index: 999;
      box-shadow: -4px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }

    .mobile-menu.open {
      right: 0;
    }

    .mobile-menu a {
      display: block;
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 400;
      color: rgba(250,247,242,0.85);
      letter-spacing: 1.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 16px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.15);
      transition: color 0.3s ease, padding-left 0.3s ease;
    }

    .mobile-menu a:hover {
      color: var(--gold);
      padding-left: 8px;
    }

    .mobile-menu .mobile-cta {
      display: inline-block;
      margin-top: 32px;
      border: 1px solid var(--gold);
      padding: 12px 28px;
      color: var(--gold);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .mobile-menu .mobile-cta:hover {
      background: var(--gold);
      color: var(--green-dark);
    }

    .mobile-menu .mobile-lang {
      margin-top: 28px;
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .mobile-menu .mobile-lang button {
      background: none;
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.3);
      color: rgba(250,247,242,0.5);
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      padding: 6px 14px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .mobile-menu .mobile-lang button.active {
      border-color: var(--gold);
      color: var(--gold);
    }

    .mobile-overlay {
      display: none;
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
      z-index: 998;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
    }

    .mobile-overlay.active {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    /* ============================================
       HERO
       ============================================ */
    .hero {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .hero-bg {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
    }
    .hero-bg video {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    .hero-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        rgba(26,77,56,0.8) 0%,
        rgba(26,77,56,0.65) 50%,
        rgba(21,61,45,0.85) 100%
      );
    }

    .hero-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      text-align: center;
      max-width: 780px;
      padding: 0 24px;
    }

    .hero-label {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      animation: heroFadeUp 0.8s 0.3s forwards;
    }

    .hero-line {
      width: 60px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--gold);
      margin: 0 auto 28px;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: scaleX(0);
      animation: heroLineExpand 0.8s 0.5s forwards;
    }

    .hero h1 {
      font-family: var(--ff-heading);
      font-size: 4rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--white);
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      animation: heroFadeUp 0.8s 0.6s forwards;
      line-height: 1.15;
    }

    .hero-text {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
      line-height: 1.75;
      max-width: 680px;
      margin: 0 auto 16px;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      animation: heroFadeUp 0.8s 0.8s forwards;
    }

    .hero-text:last-of-type {
      margin-bottom: 40px;
    }

    .hero-cta {
      display: inline-block;
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--gold);
      padding: 16px 40px;
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      animation: heroFadeUp 0.8s 1s forwards;
    }

    .hero-cta:hover {
      background: var(--gold);
      color: var(--green-dark);
    }

    .scroll-arrow {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 40px;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      z-index: 2;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: heroFadeIn 0.8s 1.2s forwards;
    }

    .scroll-arrow a {
      display: block;
      padding: 10px;
    }

    .scroll-arrow svg {
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
      stroke: var(--gold);
      animation: bounce 2s infinite;
    }

    @keyframes heroFadeIn {
      to {
        opacity: 1;
      }
    }

    @keyframes heroFadeUp {
      to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
      }
    }

    @keyframes heroLineExpand {
      to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scaleX(1);
      }
    }

    @keyframes bounce {
      0%, 20%, 50%, 80%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0);
      }
      40% {
        transform: translateY(8px);
      }
      60% {
        transform: translateY(4px);
      }
    }

    /* ============================================
       SERVICES
       ============================================ */
    .services {
      background: var(--cream);
      padding: 120px 48px;
    }

    .services-header {
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 64px;
    }

    .services-header .section-headline {
      color: var(--green-dark);
    }

    .services-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      gap: 30px;
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .service-card {
      background: var(--white);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-gold);
      border-radius: 4px;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: transform 0.4s ease, box-shadow 0.4s ease, border-color 0.4s ease;
      cursor: default;
    }

    .service-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-6px);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(26,77,56,0.1), 0 4px 12px rgba(201,169,110,0.08);
      border-color: var(--gold);
    }

    .service-card-img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 240px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .service-card-img img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      transition: transform 0.6s ease;
    }

    .service-card:hover .service-card-img img {
      transform: scale(1.04);
    }

    .service-card-body {
      padding: 32px;
    }

    .service-card-body h3 {
      font-family: var(--ff-heading);
      font-size: 1.4rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--green-dark);
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .service-card-body p {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--text-medium);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }

    /* ============================================
       GALLERY
       ============================================ */
    .gallery {
      background: var(--green-dark);
      padding: 100px 48px;
    }

    .gallery-header {
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 50px;
    }

    .gallery-header .section-headline {
      color: var(--white);
    }

    .carousel-wrapper {
      overflow: hidden;
      width: 100%;
      position: relative;
    }

    .carousel-track {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      animation: carousel-scroll 80s linear infinite;
      width: max-content;
    }

    .carousel-track:hover {
      animation-play-state: paused;
    }

    .carousel-item {
      flex: 0 0 320px;
      height: 320px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.15);
    }

    .carousel-item img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      transition: transform 0.6s ease;
    }

    .carousel-item:hover img {
      transform: scale(1.06);
    }

    .carousel-item::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 60%, rgba(26,77,56,0.4) 100%);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
    }

    .carousel-item:hover::after {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    @keyframes carousel-scroll {
      0% { transform: translateX(0); }
      100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
    }

    /* ============================================
       APPROACH
       ============================================ */
    .approach {
      background: var(--green-dark);
      padding: 120px 48px;
    }

    .approach-inner {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 80px;
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      align-items: center;
    }

    .approach-image {
      position: relative;
    }

    .approach-image-frame {
      position: relative;
      padding: 8px;
      border: 1px solid var(--gold);
    }

    .approach-image-frame img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 500px;
      object-fit: cover;
      display: block;
    }

    .approach-text .section-headline {
      color: var(--white);
    }

    .approach-quote {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      font-weight: 400;
      font-style: italic;
      color: var(--gold-light);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .approach-desc {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
      line-height: 1.8;
    }

    /* ============================================
       STORY
       ============================================ */
    .story {
      background: var(--white);
      padding: 120px 48px;
    }

    .story-inner {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 2fr 3fr;
      gap: 80px;
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      align-items: start;
    }

    .story-image {
      position: relative;
    }

    .story-image-frame {
      position: relative;
      box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(26,77,56,0.12);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-gold);
    }

    .story-image-frame img {
      width: 100%;
      height: auto;
      min-height: 480px;
      object-fit: cover;
      display: block;
    }

    .story-text .section-headline {
      color: var(--green-dark);
    }

    .story-text p {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--text-dark);
      line-height: 1.8;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .story-text p:last-child {
      margin-bottom: 0;
      font-style: italic;
      color: var(--gold);
      font-weight: 400;
    }

    /* ============================================
       CTA SECTION
       ============================================ */
    .cta-section {
      position: relative;
      padding: 140px 48px;
      text-align: center;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .cta-bg {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      background-image: url('fotos/hero-background.jpg');
      background-size: cover;
      background-position: center;
      background-attachment: fixed;
      background-repeat: no-repeat;
    }

    .cta-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      background: rgba(26,77,56,0.85);
    }

    .cta-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      max-width: 700px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .cta-content h2 {
      font-family: var(--ff-heading);
      font-size: 3rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--white);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .cta-subtitle {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--gold-light);
      margin-bottom: 40px;
    }

    .cta-btn {
      display: inline-block;
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--gold);
      padding: 16px 40px;
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .cta-btn:hover {
      background: var(--gold);
      color: var(--green-dark);
    }

    /* ============================================
       TRUSTED BY
       ============================================ */
    .trusted-by {
      background: var(--green-dark);
      padding: 60px 0;
      text-align: center;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .trusted-by h3 {
      font-family: var(--ff-body);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      margin-bottom: 40px;
    }

    .trusted-logos-wrapper {
      overflow: hidden;
      width: 100%;
      position: relative;
    }

    .trusted-logos-wrapper::before,
    .trusted-logos-wrapper::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      width: 100px;
      height: 100%;
      z-index: 2;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .trusted-logos-wrapper::before {
      left: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--green-dark), transparent);
    }

    .trusted-logos-wrapper::after {
      right: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(to left, var(--green-dark), transparent);
    }

    .trusted-logos {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 80px;
      animation: scrollLogos 30s linear infinite;
      width: max-content;
      padding-left: 80px;
    }

    .trusted-logos img {
      max-height: 60px;
      width: auto;
      opacity: 0.85;
      filter: brightness(0) invert(1);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    @keyframes scrollLogos {
      0% {
        transform: translateX(0);
      }
      100% {
        transform: translateX(-25%);
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .trusted-logos {
        gap: 60px;
      }

      .trusted-logos img {
        max-height: 45px;
      }
    }

    /* ============================================
       CONTACT FORM
       ============================================ */
    .contact-form-section {
      background: #e8e2d8;
      padding: 80px 48px;
    }

    .contact-form-inner {
      max-width: 600px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: var(--cream);
      padding: 50px 40px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    }

    .contact-form-inner h2 {

  <script>
    (function() {
      'use strict';

      // ==========================================
      // NAVBAR HIDE/SHOW ON SCROLL
      // ==========================================
      const navbar = document.getElementById('navbar');
      let lastScrollY = 0;
      let ticking = false;

      function updateNavbar() {
        const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

        if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 120) {
          navbar.classList.add('hidden');
        } else {
          navbar.classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        if (currentScrollY > 60) {
          navbar.classList.add('scrolled');
        } else {
          navbar.classList.remove('scrolled');
        }

        lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
        ticking = false;
      }

      window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
        if (!ticking) {
          window.requestAnimationFrame(updateNavbar);
          ticking = true;
        }
      }, { passive: true });

      // ==========================================
      // MOBILE MENU
      // ==========================================
      const hamburger = document.getElementById('hamburger');
      const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
      const mobileOverlay = document.getElementById('mobileOverlay');
      let menuOpen = false;

      window.toggleMobileMenu = function() {
        menuOpen = !menuOpen;
        hamburger.classList.toggle('active', menuOpen);
        mobileMenu.classList.toggle('open', menuOpen);
        mobileOverlay.classList.toggle('active', menuOpen);
        mobileOverlay.style.display = menuOpen ? 'block' : 'none';
        document.body.style.overflow = menuOpen ? 'hidden' : '';
      };

      window.closeMobileMenu = function() {
        if (menuOpen) {
          menuOpen = false;
          hamburger.classList.remove('active');
          mobileMenu.classList.remove('open');
          mobileOverlay.classList.remove('active');
          setTimeout(function() {
            mobileOverlay.style.display = 'none';
          }, 300);
          document.body.style.overflow = '';
        }
      };

      // ==========================================
      // LANGUAGE TOGGLE
      // ==========================================
      let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('ttb-lang') || 'en';

      function applyLanguage(lang) {
        const elements = document.querySelectorAll('.lang-fade');
        const dataAttr = 'data-' + lang;

        // Fade out
        elements.forEach(function(el) {
          el.classList.add('fading');
        });

        // After fade out, swap text and fade in
        setTimeout(function() {
          elements.forEach(function(el) {
            const text = el.getAttribute(dataAttr);
            if (text) {
              el.textContent = text;
            }
          });

          // Fade in
          elements.forEach(function(el) {
            el.classList.remove('fading');
          });
        }, 200);

        // Update active states
        document.getElementById('langEn').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'en');
        document.getElementById('langPt').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'pt');

        // Mobile lang buttons
        var mobileLangEn = document.querySelector('.mobile-lang-en');
        var mobileLangPt = document.querySelector('.mobile-lang-pt');
        if (mobileLangEn) mobileLangEn.classList.toggle('active', lang === 'en');
        if (mobileLangPt) mobileLangPt.classList.toggle('active', lang === 'pt');

        currentLang = lang;
        localStorage.setItem('ttb-lang', lang);
        document.documentElement.lang = lang === 'pt' ? 'pt-BR' : 'en';
      }

      window.setLanguage = function(lang) {
        if (lang !== currentLang) {
          applyLanguage(lang);
        }
      };

      // Apply saved language on load (without animation)
      if (currentLang !== 'en') {
        var elements = document.querySelectorAll('.lang-fade');
        var dataAttr = 'data-' + currentLang;
        elements.forEach(function(el) {
          var text = el.getAttribute(dataAttr);
          if (text) {
            el.textContent = text;
          }
        });
        document.getElementById('langEn').classList.remove('active');
        document.getElementById('langPt').classList.add('active');
        var mobileLangEn = document.querySelector('.mobile-lang-en');
        var mobileLangPt = document.querySelector('.mobile-lang-pt');
        if (mobileLangEn) mobileLangEn.classList.remove('active');
        if (mobileLangPt) mobileLangPt.classList.add('active');
        document.documentElement.lang = 'pt-BR';
      }

      // ==========================================
      // SCROLL REVEAL (IntersectionObserver)
      // ==========================================
      var revealElements = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');

      if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
        var revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
          entries.forEach(function(entry) {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
              var el = entry.target;

              // Determine delay based on siblings
              var parent = el.parentElement;
              var siblings = parent ? parent.querySelectorAll('.reveal') : [];
              var index = Array.prototype.indexOf.call(siblings, el);
              var delay = index >= 0 ? index * 0.1 : 0;

              el.style.transitionDelay = delay + 's';
              el.classList.add('visible');

              // Also trigger gold-line if it's one
              if (el.classList.contains('gold-line')) {
                el.classList.add('visible');
              }

              revealObserver.unobserve(el);
            }
          });
        }, {
          threshold: 0.15,
          rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px'
        });

        revealElements.forEach(function(el) {
          revealObserver.observe(el);
        });

        // Also observe gold lines
        document.querySelectorAll('.gold-line').forEach(function(el) {
          if (!el.classList.contains('reveal')) {
            revealObserver.observe(el);
          }
        });
      } else {
        // Fallback: show all
        revealElements.forEach(function(el) {
          el.classList.add('visible');
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.gold-line').forEach(function(el) {
          el.classList.add('visible');
        });
      }

      // ==========================================
      // SMOOTH SCROLL for anchor links
      // ==========================================
      document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(function(anchor) {
        anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          var targetId = this.getAttribute('href');
          if (targetId && targetId !== '#') {
            var target = document.querySelector(targetId);
            if (target) {
              e.preventDefault();
              var navHeight = navbar.offsetHeight;
              var targetPosition = target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - navHeight;
              window.scrollTo({
                top: targetPosition,
                behavior: 'smooth'
              });
            }
          }
        });
      });

    })();
  </script>
